LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT KYLE MCNEELY MOTION TO DISMISS DEFENDANT'S APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR AN ORDER TO POST BOND BY DATE CERTAIN AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON THE ODA. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO POST BOND BY DATE CERTAIN IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT MUST POST A BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $41,151.19 ON OR BEFORE AUGUST 19, 2009. (LABOR CODE SECTION 98.2(B).) REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT KYLE MCNEELY'S AMENDED MOTION FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES, BROUGHT BY COUNSEL ANNE HIPSHMAN OF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT, STATE OF CALIFORNIA. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MS. HIPSHMAN'S ORDER, AWARDING $5,722.50 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES, SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. IN ADDITION, THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT KYLE MCNEELY'S MOTION FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES ($3,815.00), BROUGHT BY COUNSEL JOHN CRANDON (FILED ON 10/14/09 BUT NOT CALENDARED). MR. CRANDON TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Amended Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT KYLE MCNEELY'S Amended Motion For Reasonable Attorney's Fees, brought by counsel Anne Hipshman of Division of Labor Standards Enforcement, State of California.
APPEARANCES: Anne Hipshman, of Division of Labor Standards Enforcement, State of California 703-4863 for moving party; John Crandon, Esq. 305-6889 for moving party.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Granted. No opposition filed. Ms. Hipshman's order, awarding $5,722.50 in attorney's fees, signed in open court. In addition, the Court granted plaintiff/respondent Kyle McNeely's motion for reasonable attorney's fees ($3,815.00), brought by counsel John Crandon (filed on 10/14/09 but not calendared). Mr. Crandon to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT KYLE MCNEELY Motion for Reasonable Attorney's Fees. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to October 28, 2009 per amended notice of motion. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Deft'S Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain And For Entry Of Judgment On The Oda
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT KYLE MCNEELY Motion to Dismiss Defendant's Appeal of the Order, Decision or Award of The Labor Commissioner or in the Alternative for an Order to Post Bond By Date Certain and for Entry of Judgment on the ODA. Appearances: Anne Hipsman, Esq. Div. Of Labor Standards Enforcements, Dept. of Industrial Relations, (415) 703-4863, appearing for Respondent and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for an Order to post bond by date certain is granted. Defendant/Appellant must post a bond in the amount of $41,151.19 on or before August 19, 2009. (Labor Code section 98.2(b).) Request for attorney's fees denied without prejudice. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
